upasargachandrika.example_text: 'uBAvantO samarzasi vatsaH sammAtarAviva' (aTarva॰13.2.13) samarzasi=yojayasi.. sammAtarO=puRyAtmAnO mAtarO
'hradaM na hi nyfzantyUrmayo brahmARIndra tava yAni varDanA' (f0 1527) nyfzanti nitarAM prApnuvanti tvayi praviSanti tvadhfdgatAni Bavanti
'aBi tvA sinDo SiSuminna mAtaro vASrA arzanti payaseva DenavaH' (f0 10754) aByarzanti=aByfzanti=aBi tvarante vegenABimuKaM yAnti
'aBI no arza divyA vasUni' (f0 99751) aByarza ita Avaha
'pari yatkAvyA kavirnfmRA basAno arzati' (f0 974) paryarzati parigacCati parikrAmannaDigacCati
'tAnsarvEH stomEravastAt paryArzan' (E0 brA0 419) paryArzan parito gatAH rakzaRArTaM parito vezwanaM kftavanta ityarTa iti sAyaRaH
